verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why should I fear tho darkened clouds may gather round me, The God I serve is one who cares and understands, Although the storms of life may threaten to confound me, All this I'm confident I'm in His Hands.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: chorus I'm in His Hands (x2) Whatever the future holds, I'm in His Hands The days I cannot see, Have all been planned for me His way is best you see, I'm in His Hands.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In days gone by my Lord has always proved sufficient, When I have yielded to the law His love demands Why should I doubt that He will evermore be faithful To make His will my own While I'm in His Hands?
